evidence: "Galaxy Quest is a must have for those who love Sci-Fi, especially shows like 'Star Trek.'"
"'Red Eye' is a thriller! It's creepy and may make you not want to fly on an airplane ever again."
"The ending to this series was amazing... It's heartbreaking, yet beautiful."
"It keeps you on the edge of your seat the whole time and makes you cry."
"This follows the story of a cast of an old Sci-Fi show that are still going to conventions."
"The cast has to come together, putting aside all differences, and try to tackle the situation at hand."
"Nicholas Cage is fantastic in this movie as a father who's just trying to survive after his wife's death."
"Plus, it's Joss Whedon's so you know it's pure brilliance :D"
"'Dollhouse' is Joss Whedon's latest fantastic epic."
"It has beautiful special effects and a magnificent storyline."
"It had me in tears (and I'm not one to cry often)."
"It leaves you feeling like BSG is over and yet there are possibilities still."

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi and musicals, particularly enjoying complex narratives with fast pacing. They show high sensitivity to production quality and have a notable loyalty to Joss Whedon, appreciating emotional depth in the content they consume.
